label: Forest
comfortReason: Trees overhead but still outdoors. Rain, wildlife, and insects make it rough.
scoutGuidance: Survival check. Poor: 2-7 | Average: 8-12 | Good: 13+. Ranger or druid has advantage. Heavy armor has disadvantage.

nat1: A mossy clearing under old growth. Peaceful.
A grove by a stream. Soft ground, good water.
Flat ground under old oaks. Feels like it was made for resting.
poor: A damp hollow. Mushrooms and mud.
Under the canopy. Better than the open.
average: A dry clearing with good tree cover.
A fallen oak creates a natural shelter.
A deer trail leads to a quiet glade.
good: A thicket so dense nothing can approach unseen.
A hollow tree large enough for a camp.
A ridge with clear lines of sight.
nat20: A hidden sylvan grove, unnaturally peaceful.
An ancient treehouse platform, sturdy and concealed.
A dry cave behind a moss curtain, invisible from outside.
